risk_description: User who creates and confirms orders can fabricate maintenance work.
User who creates equipment and maintenance orders can establish phantom assets.
User who schedules and confirms maintenance can fabricate preventive work.
User who changes equipment and manages calibration can falsify instrument records.
User who records incidents and assesses risk can manipulate safety metrics.

rule_name: Permit to Work vs HSE Audit
risk_description: User who issues permits and audits safety can approve their own work conditions.

rule_name: Risk Assessment vs Permit to Work
risk_description: User who assesses risk and issues permits can understate hazards.
User who manages change and assesses risk can minimize change impact.
User who manages chemicals and audits compliance can conceal violations.
User who sets budgets and transfers costs can manipulate project financials.
User who creates projects and sets budgets can establish unauthorized projects.
User who creates vendors and runs payments can pay fictitious vendors.
User who enters invoices and runs payments can create and pay fraudulent invoices.
User who creates vendors and enters invoices can fabricate vendor relationships.
User who posts journals and controls periods can post to closed periods.
User who posts and reverses journals can manipulate financial records.
User who creates accounts and posts to them can establish hidden accounts.
User who creates POs and receives goods can fabricate procurement.
User who creates vendors and POs can set up fictitious supply chains.
User who creates materials and moves goods can fabricate stock.
User who receives goods and counts inventory can conceal discrepancies.
User who maintains records and runs payroll can create ghost employees.
User who maintains HR data and enters time can inflate compensation.
User who creates inspections and records decisions can approve their own.
User who creates users and roles can grant unlimited access.
User who manages users and transports can move unauthorized changes.
User who reads tables and manages users can extract credentials.

rule_name: Create Meas Point vs Record Meas
risk_description: User who creates measuring points and records can fabricate readings.

rule_name: Change Maint Plan vs Confirm Order
risk_description: User who modifies plans and confirms work can manipulate schedules.
User who manages change and issues permits can bypass change controls.
